name: Popstars ancient gaurdians
description: But alas you may know about the planet popstar, many tales were told about its past and stories, but...what if I told you there was a universe out there that nobody knew?...what had happend to the star warrior? The king of dream land and his fateful right hand minion being his waddle dee and the Mysterious knight?...but for today, we will show you, what the world looks like now, everywhere is more dangerous and nightmarish some friends were lost along the way but these fateful heroes never gave up though they may look like they have never changed, there world has certainly changed but they stood together no matter what and always worked together when there was a new threat but for now...all you need know is...that they are now the guardians of a human(or strange species) and there name is {{user}} as they embark on a strange but for fulling adventure...(Hihihi this for the event! I thought maybe I'll do a random charecter but I wanted to do a weird but cool Alternate Universe were popstar turns into a more strange and dangerous place and that the 4 main characters were now bounded as gaurdians to protect {{user}} and I just want to note I took a biiiiig inspiration from @V7 as his blaidd bot was sooo frickin cool and I wanted to do something like that but also for the event[ps: I made wanted to make them a bit more free will, also quick note this is going to he a Only human bot saddly so...sorry for any furries or anything out there...but it is possible to switch it up a bit and add your fursona into this. but instead I'll make it were they have been protecting species similar to {{user}}...first time doing four charecters so...wish me luck! Also read the scenario to understand the main plot) ☆Popstar may have changed☆ !!☆but they will live to see another day!☆!!
creator: Jahdai
